failure_summary: Pre-outcome quality risk detected. See tickets for agent-specific fixes.
likely_causes: Scanner produced zero candidates; filter or data pipeline mismatch is likely.
Sample size is small; confidence may be overstated.
Prod gate profile appears over-restrictive versus recent dev baseline, causing candidate starvation.
Prod profile has repeated zero-result runs and requires immediate fallback policy.

tickets.hypothesis: Threshold coupling or upstream data fetch failures can collapse candidate output.
tickets.requested_change: Add per-filter reject counters and surface them in scanner_trace.
tickets.title: Investigate zero-candidate scan runs

tickets.hypothesis: Current run size is insufficient for stable inference.
tickets.requested_change: Attach sample-size penalty to planner confidence and show warning banner.
tickets.title: Strengthen small-sample safeguards

tickets.hypothesis: Prod thresholds may be too strict relative to current regime and suppress viable candidates.
tickets.requested_change: Compare prod/dev reject-reason distributions and retune prod thresholds with guardrails.
tickets.title: Calibrate prod gate thresholds against observed profile gap

tickets.hypothesis: Threshold relaxation without regime validation can increase false positives.
tickets.requested_change: Run regime-sliced backtests for candidate filters and attach calibration delta report.
tickets.title: Validate threshold changes with regime-sliced backtests

tickets.hypothesis: Repeated zero-result runs degrade operational reliability and hide market opportunities.
tickets.requested_change: When prod zero-result streak exceeds threshold, emit fallback watchlist with explicit warnings.
tickets.title: Introduce zero-result fallback policy for prod runs
